key.name: daily-step-goal
key.summary: Daily step goal shown on the Today ring
key.description: Used to compute the activity ring's progress. 0 hides the goal.

key.name: trends-metric
key.summary: Last metric selected on the Trends page

key.name: trends-days
key.summary: Number of days shown on the Trends chart

key.name: window-maximized
key.summary: Whether the window was maximised at last close
